# Deferred-work register

Live deferred work, keyed by the ungoverned `D-nn` convention Keystone used in
production — invisible to the governed-ID regex and dropped wholesale before
plan 017 (field-evidence C13).

| ID | Deferred item | Severity | Trigger |
|---|---|---|---|
| D-01 | Harden the hourly flush retry with jittered backoff. | High | before GA |
| D-02 | Add an admin view for expired links (JSX quirk noted: `style={{}}` renders inline). | Low | operator request |
| D-03 | Severity wording outside the enum on purpose. | Blocking-ish | next planning round |
